name: vault-omni-protocol
description: Full-stack Web3 DeFi application with yield farming, token launch, gasless transactions, bridge, and AI automation

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w contracts
scripts.test: npm run test -w frontend && npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w contracts
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w contracts
